title: ctenitis laetevirens
intro: Ctenitis laetevirens, also known as the golden-hued fern, is a species of fern that belongs to the family Dryopteridaceae. This plant is prized for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antiseptic properties that can help to soothe skin irritations and wounds. The health benefits of Ctenitis laetevirens include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and promote overall well-being. The plant can be prepared into various herbal preparations, such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
